content: The Self-Refine iterative self-feedback framework that requires no supervised data can be extended to ground multiple-perspective LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a hierarchical self-reflection system where low-level iterative output polishing enables high-level perspective inconsistency exploration. This two-tier structure resolves the common limitation of single-perspective self-feedback getting stuck in local optima while retaining the original framework's advantage of no additional training.
